name: HAV Group ASA
summary: HAV Group ASA, through its subsidiaries, provides technology and services for maritime and marine industries worldwide. The company designs and system packages for vessel construction, including SOVs for the offshore wind industry, live fish carriers for the aquaculture industry, and ferries for the transport industry. It also provides hydrogen energy systems for maritime vessels; energy design and smart control systems for a range of vessels for the marine market; and ballast water treatment systems and various other water treatment systems for the aquaculture and maritime industry. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Fosnav√É¬•g, Norway HAV Group ASA operates as a subsidiary of Havyard Group ASA .
